messages: Round score: {score}/10. Do you know what the goal of the game is, or are we just decorating the keyboard?
Round score: {score}/10. Bold strategy. The answers avoided you with impressive confidence.
Round score: {score}/10. The spelling part is still loading. Please remain calm.
Round score: {score}/10. That was a warm-up round wearing a disguise.
Round score: {score}/10. The scoreboard blinked twice and asked for a snack.
Round score: {score}/10. The words won this round. Demand a rematch.
Round score: {score}/10. Technically, you participated. That counts for something.
Round score: {score}/10. The keyboard had questions. Many questions.
Round score: {score}/10. A mysterious performance. Scholars may study it someday.
Round score: {score}/10. The spelling engine is politely pretending not to notice.
Round score: {score}/10. We have established where the floor is. Upward from here.
Round score: {score}/10. The good news: plenty of room for dramatic improvement.
Round score: {score}/10. Good job practicing. Your brain is doing push-ups.
Round score: {score}/10. Not bad. The words are starting to look nervous.
Round score: {score}/10. Progress detected. Tiny parade approved.
Round score: {score}/10. A bit wobbly, but the spelling gears are turning.
Round score: {score}/10. The scoreboard says keep going, and for once it has a point.
Round score: {score}/10. You caught some words. The rest are still acting fancy.
Round score: {score}/10. Practice round complete. The next one is already sweating.
Round score: {score}/10. You are warming up. The keyboard has been notified.
Round score: {score}/10. Some hits, some misses, strong main-character effort.
Round score: {score}/10. The spellings are not safe yet, but they should stay alert.
Round score: {score}/10. Keep pushing. The words cannot dodge forever.
Round score: {score}/10. A respectable start with a suspicious amount of chaos.
Round score: {score}/10. Very nice. The spelling muscles are showing up.
Round score: {score}/10. Solid work. The scoreboard is nodding like it planned this.
Round score: {score}/10. That was sharp. A few words escaped, but not gracefully.
Round score: {score}/10. Nice push. The misses are starting to look accidental.
Round score: {score}/10. Strong round. The keyboard is considering applause.
Round score: {score}/10. You are getting dangerous. The words have noticed.
Round score: {score}/10. Clean effort. A little polish and this gets scary.
Round score: {score}/10. Very respectable. The scoreboard put on its serious face.
Round score: {score}/10. Good control. The spelling lane is opening up.
Round score: {score}/10. That had momentum. Keep that engine running.
Round score: {score}/10. Nice accuracy. The incorrect answers are losing influence.
Round score: {score}/10. A strong run with just enough mystery to keep it interesting.
Round score: {score}/10. Amazing. The words barely escaped.
Round score: {score}/10. Excellent. The scoreboard just sat up straighter.
Round score: {score}/10. That was nearly illegal levels of spelling.
Round score: {score}/10. Very impressive. The keyboard may ask for your autograph.
Round score: {score}/10. Sharp work. The words are filing a complaint.
Round score: {score}/10. That was smooth. Suspiciously smooth.
Round score: {score}/10. Big spelling energy. The scoreboard is trying to act normal.
Round score: {score}/10. Excellent round. Please leave some points for everyone else.
Round score: {score}/10. That was clean. The misses forgot to show up.
Round score: {score}/10. Great run. The keyboard is probably bragging now.
Round score: {score}/10. Fantastic. Are you secretly a spelling robot?
Round score: {score}/10. Top-tier spelling. The scoreboard needs a moment.
